curation.synopsis: Sergeant Wulfe and the tank crews of the 81st Cadian Armoured, the Gunheads, roll onto Golgotha as part of an Imperial battlegroup with a strange objective: recover the Fortress of Arrogance, the lost battle tank of the legendary Commissar Yarrick, and haul it home to fire the Imperium's war on Armageddon. Golgotha is a furnace world swarming with hundreds of thousands of Orks, and the salvage run quickly becomes a fighting odyssey across hostile ground. Wulfe must hold his crew together while a bitter rival, Corporal Lenck, works against him and a haunting vision gnaws at his nerve. A gritty armoured-warfare tale of tanks, dust and the cost of a symbol.
